summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Real-time Price Streaming feature. Fixed critical backend bug (route ordering). All 14 backend API tests pass. Frontend live prices working correctly across Trading, Investments, Watchlist, and AutoTrade pages.

fixed.issue: Routes were being matched by /api/prices/{symbol} parameterized route instead of specific routes
fixed.fix: Reordered routes in server.py - specific routes (/prices/watchlist, /prices/positions) now come BEFORE parameterized route (/prices/{symbol})

issues: Nested button warning: watchlist button is inside card button element - causes HTML validation warning but doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/prices/batch requires auth (401)
Backend: POST /api/prices/batch returns price data for valid symbols
Backend: POST /api/prices/batch limits to 100 symbols
Backend: POST /api/prices/batch handles empty list
Backend: GET /api/prices/{symbol} requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/prices/{symbol} returns data for valid symbol
Backend: GET /api/prices/{symbol} returns zero for invalid symbol
Backend: GET /api/prices/watchlist requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/prices/watchlist returns correct format
Backend: GET /api/prices/positions requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/prices/positions returns correct format
Backend: GET /api/prices/watchlist returns data when items exist
Backend: Trading scan symbols work with live prices
Backend: Investments scan symbols work with live prices
Frontend: Trading page shows 'Live prices • Updates every 12s' indicator
Frontend: Trading page shows green dot (LiveIndicator) next to symbols
Frontend: Trading page displays live prices and change percentages
Frontend: Investments page shows 'Live prices • Updates every 20s • Showing 30 prices' indicator
Frontend: Investments page limits live prices to 30 symbols for performance
Frontend: Investments page shows green dots next to symbols with live data
Frontend: Watchlist page shows 'Live prices • Updates every 15s' indicator
Frontend: Watchlist page shows live prices for watchlist items
Frontend: AutoTrade page shows 'Live prices • Updates every 12s' indicator
Frontend: AutoTrade page shows live prices in trade queue
Frontend: No infinite loop or excessive re-render warnings
Frontend: No live price related console errors
Frontend: Page remains responsive after 25 seconds of live updates
action_items: Consider fixing nested button issue in Investments.jsx (line 208) - watchlist button inside card button causes HTML validation warning
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed route ordering bug - parameterized routes must come AFTER specific routes in FastAPI
Live prices implementation uses proper memoization (React.memo) on card components
Investments page correctly limits live prices to 30 symbols to avoid API overload
All hooks properly clean up intervals on unmount (mountedRef pattern)
Flash effects on price changes implemented correctly
seed_data_creation: Added AAPL to watchlist for testing watchlist prices
context_for_next_testing_agent: Real-time price streaming feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: /api/prices/batch (POST), /api/prices/{symbol} (GET), /api/prices/watchlist (GET), /api/prices/positions (GET). Frontend hooks: useLivePrices, useWatchlistPrices, usePositionsPrices. All card components are memoized. Investments page limits to 30 live prices for performance. Note: Alpaca API returns 401 (invalid keys) so Portfolio positions are empty. Fixed bug: route ordering in server.py.

endpoints: POST /api/prices/batch - Get prices for multiple symbols (max 100)
GET /api/prices/watchlist - Get prices for watchlist symbols
GET /api/prices/positions - Get prices for position symbols

pages.Investments: Live prices • Updates every 20s • Showing 30 prices - WORKING

bug_fixed.issue: GET /api/prices/watchlist and /api/prices/positions returning single symbol response instead of prices object
bug_fixed.root_cause: FastAPI route matching - parameterized route /prices/{symbol} was defined before specific routes, causing 'watchlist' and 'positions' to be matched as symbol names
bug_fixed.fix: Reordered routes so specific routes come before parameterized route

known_issues.alpaca_401: Alpaca API returns 401 (invalid keys) - Portfolio positions empty, execution fails but workflow is correct
known_issues.nested_button: HTML validation warning for nested button in Investments.jsx - doesn't affect functionality
